demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence; a neighbour checks in

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I stood up to get a glass of water, the room spun completely out of control, and the next thing I knew I was on the floor.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Neighbour called after finding her on the floor during the heatwave — she blacked out standing up, seems muddled, and has barely passed any water all day.

symptom_narrative.onset: collapsed today on standing; the intense thirst and reduced urine have been building over about two days
symptom_narrative.duration: about 24 hours of very little urine; the faint happened today
symptom_narrative.character: the room spun and she went down; since then very weak and heavy-limbed, with cramping in both calves
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says she has never felt this wiped out; could not get herself up off the floor
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole-body weakness and dizziness; cramps in the calves
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the dizziness comes on hard whenever she tries to stand
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: intense thirst, very dark and strong-smelling urine, passing much less than usual, dry mouth
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: normally independent; today she is bedbound and cannot stand without the room spinning

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure, treated with tablets

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a 'water tablet' (fluid tablet) taken every day

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; the house has been extremely hot and the air conditioning was switched off during a heatwave; neighbour found her and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: neighbour reports finding her on the floor after she blacked out standing up to get water
neighbour says she seems suddenly muddled and unsure of the date and time, which is not like her
she says she has passed only a small amount of dark, strong-smelling urine in the last day
neighbour notes the water jug is untouched — she has barely been drinking despite saying she is very thirsty
lips and mouth look very dry and her eyes look sunken; she looks frail and drowsy
the house is very hot and the air conditioning unit is switched off
